calendar.matters:
Declaration Of Plaintiff Iso Request For Entry Of Default Judgment By Court
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 514; Judge Harry Jacobs; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:27:32 a.m. and concluding at 09:36:05 a.m.

Plaintiff 1030 Polk Street Associations, LP represented by Sam W. Wu, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Luis Norori Antique Restoration, Inc. not appearing.

MATTHEW HUEY is placed under oath.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents offer of proof.
MATTHEW HUEY is examined by the Court.

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff's witness and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff 1030 Polk Associations, LP, and against Defendant Luis Norori Antique Restoration, Inc., as follows:

1. Principal: $142,729.87 ($159,729.87 Principal - $17,000.00 Credit)
2. Costs: $1,050.23
3. Attorney Fees: $5,775.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $149,555.10

Plaintiff is entitled to possession of the residential real property located at 2025 Newcomb Ave., B-1, San Francisco, CA 94124, County of San Francisco.

This judgment applies to all occupants of the premises, including tenants, subtenants if any, and named claimants if any.

Defendant's commercial lease is forfeited.

Counsel for Plaintiff shall file separate costs memorandums for the award of attorney fees and costs. Proposed judgment to be submitted.

Declaration Of Plaintiff Iso Request For Entry Of Default Judgment By Court
Off Calendar Oct-11-2022 Continued To Dec-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for hearing on request for default judgment by Court.

Dept. 514; Judge: Murlene J. Randle; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:45:08 a.m. and concluding at 09:48:09 a.m.

Plaintiff 103 Polk Associations, LP represented by Sam W. Wu, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Luis Norori Antique Restoration, Inc. appearing in pro per by Luis Norori via Zoom Video Conference.

MATTHEW HUEY is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.
Witness did not testify.

Defendant is in default status.
Parties retire to breakout room to engage in settlement negotiations.

Plaintiff requests a continuance for the parties to resolve the matter.
Court orders matter continued to Dec-06-2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 514 pursuant to the request of Plaintiff.

Declaration Of Plaintiff Iso Request For Entry Of Default Judgment By Court
Off Calendar Aug-25-2022 Continued To Oct-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
